prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical premium potato chips package design based on an ornate anime princess illustration, like a finished retail snack bag mockup.

Canvas: Portrait 3:4 product-package image, full front view of a glossy crinkled potato chip bag with sealed ridged top and bottom edges. Use a deep midnight navy and black-purple background with gold trim, sparkles, tiny stars, and luxury confectionery styling.

Main subject: On the left and center, show an elegant anime-style princess bride wearing an elaborate white lace gown with gold embroidery, jeweled bodice, pearl details, bows, floral appliqués, and a translucent veil flowing across the package. She holds a bouquet of yellow, cream, and pink roses. Her face area is covered by a plain centered beige rectangular placeholder, as if the character portrait can be swapped in later. Her long pale silver-blonde hair and veil blend into a magical starry night background.

Brand and text layout: At the upper right, place an ornate gold logo frame with a small crown and the brand name Étoile de Reine, with the small Japanese subtitle 「エトワール・ドゥ・レーヌ」 beneath it. Below the logo, add a small elegant Japanese tagline 「やさしい時間を、ひとくちのごほうびに。」. Make the largest central headline in Japanese read ポテトチップス in creamy white with a gold glow. At the top left, add a vertical hanging ribbon label in dark navy and gold that says 期間限定.

Flavor badge: On the right middle, create a cream circular ornamental label with gold filigree and flowers. Text inside should read 「ふんわり香る」 above the main flavor はちみつ バター味. Add a small mauve ribbon across the badge reading 「やさしい甘さとコク」. Beneath it, include small Japanese copy: 「はちみつのやさしい甘さと バターのコクがとろける、 幸せな味わい。」

Food elements: In the lower right foreground, show exactly 5 large golden potato chips overlapping, with visible seasoning specks and realistic crisp texture. To their right, show exactly 1 small glass bowl of honey with exactly 1 wooden honey dipper dripping honey. In front of it, show exactly 1 small white dish holding exactly 1 square pat of butter.

Quality badge and decorative elements: In the lower left, add a cream and gold circular badge reading 「国産じゃがいも 100% 使用」. Decorate the bottom left with pink roses and small flowers. Along the bottom, place a dark ribbon banner with gold trim reading 星降る夜のような、やさしいごほうび。. Add tiny legal text at bottom right: 「※写真・イラストはイメージです。」

Visual style: Highly polished Japanese luxury snack packaging, glossy plastic reflections, realistic package folds and highlights, ornate gold typography, soft magical lighting, detailed anime illustration, romantic royal theme, premium limited-edition feel. Keep all text legible and arranged like a real retail package. Do not add extra characters, extra food items, logos, barcodes, or watermarks.
